layout.title: Season calendar
layout.subtitle: Your tasks month by month, based on your parcel data. Use the “Summary” tab to confirm the full calendar.

calendar.draftHint: Confirm your calendar in the Summary tab to turn on reminders.
calendar.emptyBody: If you just finished calibration, wait a moment then tap “Recalculate calendar”. Otherwise open Summary to create or restore your plan.

summary.emptyTitle: Your season calendar is not ready for this parcel yet.
summary.emptyLead: Usually the calendar is created automatically after smart monitoring is turned on. If not, the button below builds it from your crop and saved data.
summary.technicalDetailsBody: Common issue: crop reference missing in the database or crop type not set. A specific error message appears after “Prepare my calendar”.
summary.title: Season summary
summary.draftBanner: This is a proposal. Once confirmed, you can follow tasks month by month and get useful reminders.
summary.strengthsNone: No task marked as done yet.
summary.attentionPlanned: {{count}} task(s) still scheduled in the calendar.
summary.attentionNone: Nothing waiting in the calendar for now.

page.title: Smart calibration
page.subtitle: The questionnaire and your parcel data help adapt monitoring (tips and calendar).

annualBanner.title: Annual recalibration available
annualBanner.body: Your harvest looks finished. Run annual calibration to refresh the season reference.

observationMode.title: Observation mode
observationMode.body: Confidence is too low for active recommendations. Add soil/water analyses or harvest history to improve accuracy.

nextStep.title: Next step on your parcel
nextStep.body: Monitoring is on. Review your season calendar and suggested tips to move to field work.
nextStep.hintDraft: Confirm the calendar in the summary to turn on reminders and practical follow-up.
nextStep.hintTips: Tips are ready to read or put into practice.
nextStep.hintNoTips: No new tip for now; ongoing monitoring may suggest some as the season goes on.

wizard.title: Step-by-step assistant
wizard.subtitle: A few questions about your parcel and practices to run your personalized monitoring.
wizard.toastProgressSaved: Progress saved. You can continue later.
wizard.toastRequiredStepsError: Complete the required fields in steps 1 and 2 first.

runInputs.title: What was used in the last run
runInputs.subtitle: Summary of what you entered and data already stored (satellite, weather, lab analyses, harvests). For information only — changes go through the assistant.
runInputs.editHint: To update these items and recalculate monitoring, use a {{targeted}} or a {{full}} in the assistant.

phases.active: AI is running for this parcel — alerts, recommendations, and the plan use your calibration.
phases.awaiting_validation: Calibration report is ready. Validate it to unlock operational monitoring.
phases.awaiting_nutrition_option: Pick a nutrition option (A, B, or C) to finish activation.
phases.in_progress: Data collection and analysis in progress — check back shortly.
phases.paused: AI monitoring is paused for this parcel.
phases.default: Run calibration to unlock the crop compass (NDVI, stress, intervention plan).

compass.scenarioUnavailable: Scenario unavailable (satellite data or AI phase). Complete calibration or check satellite imagery.
compass.observationScenarioNote: Observation mode — the scenario reflects cautious monitoring.
compass.weatherAnomalyYes: Anomaly detected on the recent window
compass.alertsBody: Risks flagged by the model — to handle or resolve.
compass.tipsBody: Suggested actions for your parcel — read and apply if you wish.
compass.calendarCardBody: Tasks month by month, based on your crop and data.

toasts.ensurePlanError: Could not create the season calendar

errors.invalidPlanPayload: The server returned an invalid season plan.
